title: tetradenia acutivena
intro: Tetradenia acutivena, also known as African lemongrass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tetradenia acutivena include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves and essential oil of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
